title: The Skinwalker Hunt
description: This mod is a horror mod that adds a new mob called Skinwalker who can transform into other mobs to hunt the player
body:
This mod is a horror mod that adds a new mob called Skinwalker who can transform into other mobs to hunt the player

 

Subscribe on mod's platforms:

Discord Server

YouTube

Telegram channel

Wiki

VK (Russian) 

 

 



Skinwalker

New rare mob that spawns in any biome in Overworld. Have 500 HP and 8 attack damage. Adds Nausea and Blindness effects when attacking the player
Spawns in form of Cat, Wolf, Villager, Cow, Sheep, Pig and don't attack the player. 
If attacked by player or during the night or in the cave it transforms in their true form when the player is near 10 blocks and starts to attack
If it haven't been attacked during the night it can transforms back into mobs form at the day
Skinwalker can break the blocks while chasing the player and player isn't higher than 2 blocks above Skinwalker
It could step and climb on 5 blocks height
Drops Skinwalker Eye, Bone, Flesh and Mask, Netherite Scrap, and Iron Axe enchanted of Sharpness III and Unbreaking II

You can disable Enchanted Iron Axe dropping by skinwalkerIronAxeDrop gamerule
Command to disable it:
/gamerule skinwalkerIronAxeDrop false
To enable it back:
/gamerule skinwalkerIronAxeDrop true

Chupacabra:
Have 1000 HP, 6 attack damage. Applies Nausea and Blindness on attack. Very fast. Can step on 5 blocks high. Can break blocks and attack Cows, Sheeps, Chickens, Pigs and Villagers. Breaks Boats and Minecarts. Immune to Fire. Slowly regenerates

/gamerule doChupacabraBreaksBlocks - game rule that allows to disable Chupacabra breaking blocks




Skinwalker Mask

New decorative mask

 

Skinwalker Trophy
New decorative block that can be made of Skinwalker Mask and any Plank. It also can be crafted back into Mask

 


Items:

- Skinwalker Eye, Bone, and Flesh. Can be brewed into Potion of the Skinwalker Hunt
- Potion of the Skinwalker Hunt. Adds Night Vision, Regeneration III, and Strength III

 

This mod made as a request for one person and was allowed to be released in public
